name: python3-stem
title: python3-stem
summary: Tor control library for Python 3 series
description:
Tor control library for Python 3 series
Stem is a Python controller library for Tor. With it you can use
Tor's control protocol to script against the Tor process and read
descriptor data relays publish about themselves.
.
This is Python 3 series module.

commands.name: python3-tor-prompt
commands.description: a stem direct access implementation to Tor's control interface

arguments.description: a stem direct access implementation to Tor's control interface
arguments.raw: -prompt  a stem direct access implementation to Tor's control interface

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tor-prompt with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tor-prompt --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
